FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

SELECT [t].[id], [t].[created_at], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[updated_at], [t].[user_id], [t0].[id], [t0].[cart_id], [t0].[created_at], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[product_id], [t0].[quantity], [t0].[unit_price], [t0].[updated_at], [t0].[id0], [t0].[category_id], [t0].[created_at0], [t0].[created_by], [t0].[description], [t0].[image_url], [t0].[is_active], [t0].[is_deleted], [t0].[name], [t0].[price], [t0].[stock], [t0].[updated_at0], [t0].[updated_by], [t0].[id1], [t0].[created_at1], [t0].[image_url0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[is_main], [t0].[product_id0], [t0].[sort_order], [t0].[UpdatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

FROM [order_items] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[id], [o0].[status]
    FROM [orders] AS [o0]
    WHERE [o0].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [o].[order_id] = [t].[id]
WHERE [t].[status] = 4
GROUP BY [o].[product_id]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([o].[quantity]), 0) DESC

        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]

    ORDER BY [c].[SentAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
ORDER BY [t].[SentAt]

    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]

    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

FROM [order_items] AS [o]

    SELECT [o0].[id], [o0].[status]
    FROM [orders] AS [o0]
    WHERE [o0].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [o].[order_id] = [t].[id]

GROUP BY [o].[product_id]

        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]

SELECT [t].[id], [t].[created_at], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[updated_at], [t].[user_id], [t0].[id], [t0].[cart_id], [t0].[created_at], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[product_id], [t0].[quantity], [t0].[unit_price], [t0].[updated_at], [t0].[id0], [t0].[category_id], [t0].[created_at0], [t0].[created_by], [t0].[description], [t0].[image_url], [t0].[is_active], [t0].[is_deleted], [t0].[name], [t0].[price], [t0].[stock], [t0].[updated_at0], [t0].[updated_by], [t0].[id1], [t0].[created_at1], [t0].[image_url0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[is_main], [t0].[product_id0], [t0].[sort_order], [t0].[UpdatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

    WHERE ([c].[SenderId] = @__userId1_0 AND [c].[ReceiverId] = @__userId2_1) OR ([c].[SenderId] = @__userId2_1 AND [c].[ReceiverId] = @__userId1_0)
    ORDER BY [c].[SentAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
ORDER BY [t].[SentAt]

SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [o].[product_id] AS [ProductId], COALESCE(SUM([o].[quantity]), 0) AS [TotalSold]
FROM [order_items] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[id], [o0].[status]
    FROM [orders] AS [o0]
    WHERE [o0].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [o].[order_id] = [t].[id]
WHERE [t].[status] = 4
GROUP BY [o].[product_id]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([o].[quantity]), 0) DESC

    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

SELECT [t].[id], [t].[created_at], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[updated_at], [t].[user_id], [t0].[id], [t0].[cart_id], [t0].[created_at], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[product_id], [t0].[quantity], [t0].[unit_price], [t0].[updated_at], [t0].[id0], [t0].[category_id], [t0].[created_at0], [t0].[created_by], [t0].[description], [t0].[image_url], [t0].[is_active], [t0].[is_deleted], [t0].[name], [t0].[price], [t0].[stock], [t0].[updated_at0], [t0].[updated_by], [t0].[id1], [t0].[created_at1], [t0].[image_url0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[is_main], [t0].[product_id0], [t0].[sort_order], [t0].[UpdatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

SELECT [t].[id], [t].[created_at], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[updated_at], [t].[user_id], [t0].[id], [t0].[cart_id], [t0].[created_at], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[product_id], [t0].[quantity], [t0].[unit_price], [t0].[updated_at], [t0].[id0], [t0].[category_id], [t0].[created_at0], [t0].[created_by], [t0].[description], [t0].[image_url], [t0].[is_active], [t0].[is_deleted], [t0].[name], [t0].[price], [t0].[stock], [t0].[updated_at0], [t0].[updated_by], [t0].[id1], [t0].[created_at1], [t0].[image_url0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[is_main], [t0].[product_id0], [t0].[sort_order], [t0].[UpdatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

) AS [t]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

SELECT [t].[id], [t].[created_at], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[updated_at], [t].[user_id], [t0].[id], [t0].[cart_id], [t0].[created_at], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[product_id], [t0].[quantity], [t0].[unit_price], [t0].[updated_at], [t0].[id0], [t0].[category_id], [t0].[created_at0], [t0].[created_by], [t0].[description], [t0].[image_url], [t0].[is_active], [t0].[is_deleted], [t0].[name], [t0].[price], [t0].[stock], [t0].[updated_at0], [t0].[updated_by], [t0].[id1], [t0].[created_at1], [t0].[image_url0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[is_main], [t0].[product_id0], [t0].[sort_order], [t0].[UpdatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

FROM (

    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

FROM (
    SELECT [o].[id], [o].[cancel_reason], [o].[CancellationReason], [o].[cancelled_at], [o].[created_at], [o].[delivered_at], [o].[discount_amount], [o].[is_deleted], [o].[note], [o].[order_code], [o].[paid_at], [o].[payment_method], [o].[payment_status], [o].[shipped_at], [o].[shipping_district], [o].[shipping_fee], [o].[shipping_full_name], [o].[shipping_phone], [o].[shipping_province], [o].[shipping_street], [o].[shipping_ward], [o].[status], [o].[sub_total], [o].[total_amount], [o].[updated_at], [o].[user_id], [o].[voucher_code], [o].[voucher_id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]

) AS [t]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]

SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [o].[product_id] AS [ProductId], COALESCE(SUM([o].[quantity]), 0) AS [TotalSold]
FROM [order_items] AS [o]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[id], [o0].[status]
    FROM [orders] AS [o0]
    WHERE [o0].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [o].[order_id] = [t].[id]
WHERE [t].[status] = 4
GROUP BY [o].[product_id]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([o].[quantity]), 0) DESC

FROM [products] AS [p]

    FROM OPENJSON(@__productIds_0) WITH ([value] uniqueidentifier '$') AS [p0]
) AND [p].[is_active] = CAST(1 AS bit)

SELECT [t].[id], [t].[created_at], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[updated_at], [t].[user_id], [t0].[id], [t0].[cart_id], [t0].[created_at], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[product_id], [t0].[quantity], [t0].[unit_price], [t0].[updated_at], [t0].[id0], [t0].[category_id], [t0].[created_at0], [t0].[created_by], [t0].[description], [t0].[image_url], [t0].[is_active], [t0].[is_deleted], [t0].[name], [t0].[price], [t0].[stock], [t0].[updated_at0], [t0].[updated_by], [t0].[id1], [t0].[created_at1], [t0].[image_url0], [t0].[IsDeleted0], [t0].[is_main], [t0].[product_id0], [t0].[sort_order], [t0].[UpdatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[id], [c].[created_at], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[updated_at], [c].[user_id]
    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [cart_items] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
        WHERE [p].[is_deleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [c0].[product_id] = [t1].[id]
    LEFT JOIN [product_images] AS [p0] ON [t1].[id] = [p0].[product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[id] = [t0].[cart_id]
ORDER BY [t].[id], [t0].[id], [t0].[id0]

    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[user_id] = @__userId_0
) AS [t]

    SELECT [c0].[id], [c0].[cart_id], [c0].[created_at], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[product_id], [c0].[quantity], [c0].[unit_price], [c0].[updated_at], [t1].[id] AS [id0], [t1].[category_id], [t1].[created_at] AS [created_at0], [t1].[created_by], [t1].[description], [t1].[image_url], [t1].[is_active], [t1].[is_deleted], [t1].[name], [t1].[price], [t1].[stock], [t1].[updated_at] AS [updated_at0], [t1].[updated_by], [p0].[id] AS [id1], [p0].[created_at] AS [created_at1], [p0].[image_url] AS [image_url0], [p0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [p0].[is_main], [p0].[product_id] AS [product_id0], [p0].[sort_order], [p0].[UpdatedAt]

    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [p].[id], [p].[category_id], [p].[created_at], [p].[created_by], [p].[description], [p].[image_url], [p].[is_active], [p].[is_deleted], [p].[name], [p].[price], [p].[stock], [p].[updated_at], [p].[updated_by]
        FROM [products] AS [p]
